data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for scope-based binding.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the 'Scope-based binding (required/recommended/optional)' requirement, but there is no concrete evidence provided that demonstrates this requirement has been fulfilled. The linked use case mentions the need for scope-based binding, yet the evidence does not include any references or checks that confirm its implementation. Therefore, the validation is inconclusive due to a lack of supporting evidence.
gaps: No evidence of scope-based binding being created or utilized.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence for scope-based binding
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the scope-based binding requirement.
